title: phalangium longifolium
intro: Phalangium longifolium, also known as Phalangium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Phalangium longifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
